summary: Tested 3 features: (1) Birthday Card public page at /birthday/{card_id}, (2) Share Showroom Link tile on More page, (3) Inbox email prompt SMS switch. All backend APIs pass (6/6 tests). All frontend features render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Birthday card page [cardId].tsx correctly implements all required elements: headline, customer photo/initials, message, salesman info with photo/title/store, Share/Save buttons, Call/Email CTAs, confetti decorations, and footer
more.tsx correctly adds 'Share Showroom Link' tile in Performance section (lines 445-460) with clipboard copy functionality
thread/[id].tsx email-prompt-close button (line 1698-1705) correctly implements SMS fallback: closes prompt, clears email input, sets mode to SMS, and persists to AsyncStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three features tested: (1) Birthday Card - public landing page at /birthday/{card_id} renders correctly with all UI elements including Happy Birthday headline, customer photo with circular border, birthday message, salesman info (name/title/store), store logo, Share/Save buttons, Call/Email CTAs, and confetti decorations. API GET /api/birthday/card/{card_id} returns proper JSON with card_type='birthday', customer info, salesman object, and style object. (2) Share Showroom Link - tile added to More page Performance section, copies showroom URL to clipboard. (3) Inbox email prompt close button - when user tries to switch to email mode but contact has no email, prompt appears; clicking SMS button (email-prompt-close) correctly hides prompt and switches back to SMS mode.

elements_verified: Customer photo with circular border (or initials fallback)
Birthday message with customer name substitution
Footer: Powered by i'M On Social

email_prompt_sms_switch.trigger: User clicks 'Switch to Email' when contact has no email
email_prompt_sms_switch.behavior: Email prompt banner appears with input field, Save button, and SMS button
email_prompt_sms_switch.sms_button_action: Closes prompt, clears email input, switches mode to SMS, persists to AsyncStorage
